title: Individual Counseling * Pregnant Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Individual Counseling * Pregnant Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Hispanic/Latino Community Immigration Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CHARLIE HEALTH VIRTUAL ADULT INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual intensive outpatient counseling, including individual, group, and family therapy. Specialized tracks include trauma (such as survivors of sexual assault, domestic violence, and/or other complex trauma), LGBTQ2+, maternal mental health, and neurodivergent clients, including those with autism, ADHD, or other conditions, along with co-occurring mental health issues. Also provides participants with wrap-around support, including discharge planning, family support groups, and alumni support groups and events for participants. Also, provides specialized information and referrals on mental health resources. Eligibility: Ages 18-64 Hours: Intake: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Treatment: Varies by service Email (986) 206-0414 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
